pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to support the new JDK.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Remove the Spring Data MongoDB starter dependency, likely switching to a different persistence layer or removing it entirely.
Upgrade the Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to a version compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Replace the deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI, which is the standard for Spring Boot 3.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace Debian-based apt-get package installation with Alpine-based apk add commands due to the switch to an Alpine Linux base image.
Explicitly install Maven via apk since the new base image does not include it, allowing the build to proceed inside the container.
Define a specific entrypoint to run the packaged JAR file, replacing the generic bash shell command to ensure the application starts correctly in production.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Upgrade rxjs to major version 7.8.1, which is a breaking change in API but often required for modern framework compatibility.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Upgrade Stryker mutation testing tools from v4 to v6 to support newer Node/Jest versions.
